_test_description: turn_completed at summary privacy level: query_text and response_text are summarised (not verbatim). Includes query_intent, topics, query_tokens, response_tokens, model_id, ad_rendered, response_mode, response_type.

turn.query_text: User asked about best noise-cancelling headphones under a budget.
turn.response_text: Agent recommended two models based on review sources, comparing noise cancellation and sound quality.
